title: Dexterous Grasping Trajectories
description: Collect and annotate multi-fingered grasping demonstrations across diverse household objects. Data trains π0-class vision-language-action models for contact-rich manipulation. Contributors record grasping sequences and label grasp type, contact points, and success criteria.

tasks.title: Record grasping demonstration
tasks.description: Capture a multi-angle video of grasping a household object (mug, bottle, tool, fabric). Include approach, grasp, lift, and place phases.

tasks.title: Grasp annotation
tasks.description: Segment into approach/grasp/lift/place phases, label grasp type (power/precision/pinch), mark contact keypoints, describe the object and grasp strategy.

tasks.title: Trajectory validation
tasks.description: Phase boundary consistency, keypoint coverage, grasp type distribution balance.
